006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall;
018
019import java.math.*;
020import java.time.*;
021
022/**
023 * Supported wire formats for {@link Duration} values.
024 */
025public enum DurationFormat {
026
027   NOT_SET,
028   ISO_8601,
029   ISO_8601_WITH_DAYS,
030   NANOS,
031   MILLIS,
032   SECONDS,
033   HOCON;
034
035   private static final BigDecimal NANOS_PER_SECOND = BigDecimal.valueOf(1_000_000_000L);
036
037   /**
038    * Formats the specified duration using this format.
039    *
040    * @param value The value to format.
041    * @return The formatted value.
042    */
043   public String format(Duration value) {
044      if (value == null)
045         return null;
046      return switch (this) {
047         case NOT_SET, ISO_8601 -> value.toString();
048         case ISO_8601_WITH_DAYS -> formatIso8601WithDays(value);
049         case NANOS -> Long.toString(value.toNanos());
050         case MILLIS -> Long.toString(value.toMillis());
051         case SECONDS -> {
052            long seconds = value.getSeconds();
053            int nanos = value.getNano();
054            yield seconds + "." + String.format("%09d", nanos);
055         }
056         case HOCON -> formatHocon(value);
057      };
058   }
059
060   /**
061    * Parses the specified wire value using this format.
062    *
063    * @param value The value to parse.
064    * @return The parsed duration.
065    */
066   public Duration parse(String value) {
067      if (value == null)
068         return null;
069      String s = value.trim();
070      if (s.isEmpty())
071         return null;
072      return switch (this) {
073         case NOT_SET, ISO_8601, ISO_8601_WITH_DAYS -> Duration.parse(normalizeIso(s));
074         case NANOS -> Duration.ofNanos(Long.parseLong(s));
075         case MILLIS -> Duration.ofMillis(Long.parseLong(s));
076         case SECONDS -> parseSeconds(s);
077         case HOCON -> parseHocon(s);
078      };
079   }
080
081   /**
082    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if this format is numeric on the wire.
083    *
084    * @return <jk>true</jk> if this format emits numeric wire values.
085    */
086   public boolean isNumeric() {
087      return this == NANOS || this == MILLIS || this == SECONDS;
088   }
089
090   private static String normalizeIso(String s) {
091      String x = s;
092      if (x.startsWith("PT-"))
093         x = "-PT" + x.substring(3);
094      return x;
095   }
096
097   private static Duration parseSeconds(String s) {
098      var bd = new BigDecimal(s);
099      long seconds = bd.longValue();
100      BigDecimal frac = bd.subtract(BigDecimal.valueOf(seconds));
101      int nanos = frac.multiply(NANOS_PER_SECOND).intValue();
102      return Duration.ofSeconds(seconds, nanos);
103   }
104
105   @SuppressWarnings({
106      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for ISO-8601 duration formatting logic
107   })
108   private static String formatIso8601WithDays(Duration value) {
109      boolean neg = value.isNegative();
110      Duration d = neg ? value.abs() : value;
111      long totalSeconds = d.getSeconds();
112      int nanos = d.getNano();
113      long days = totalSeconds / 86400;
114      long rem = totalSeconds % 86400;
115      long hours = rem / 3600;
116      rem %= 3600;
117      long minutes = rem / 60;
118      long seconds = rem % 60;
119
120      var sb = new StringBuilder();
121      if (neg)
122         sb.append('-');
123      sb.append('P');
124      if (days > 0)
125         sb.append(days).append('D');
126      if (hours > 0 || minutes > 0 || seconds > 0 || nanos > 0 || days == 0) {
127         sb.append('T');
128         if (hours > 0)
129            sb.append(hours).append('H');
130         if (minutes > 0)
131            sb.append(minutes).append('M');
132         if (seconds > 0 || nanos > 0 || (hours == 0 && minutes == 0))
133            sb.append(seconds).append(nanos == 0 ? "" : "." + trimTrailingZeros(String.format("%09d", nanos))).append('S');
134      }
135      return sb.toString();
136   }
137
138   private static String formatHocon(Duration value) {
139      long nanos = value.toNanos();
140      long abs = Math.abs(nanos);
141      if (abs == 0)
142         return "0s";
143      long sign = nanos < 0 ? -1 : 1;
144      long[] divisors = {86_400_000_000_000L, 3_600_000_000_000L, 60_000_000_000L, 1_000_000_000L, 1_000_000L, 1_000L, 1L};
145      String[] suffixes = {"d", "h", "m", "s", "ms", "us", "ns"};
146      for (int i = 0; i < divisors.length; i++) {
147         long divisor = divisors[i];
148         if (abs % divisor == 0)
149            return (sign * (abs / divisor)) + suffixes[i];
150      }
151      return nanos + "ns";
152   }
153
154   private static Duration parseHocon(String s) {
155      // Programmatic equivalent of full match ^([+-]?\d++(?:\.\d++)?)(ns|us|ms|s|m|h|d)$ (CASE_INSENSITIVE) to avoid per-parse matching.
156      // Group 1 = the numeric part, group 2 = the (case-insensitive) unit suffix. \d = ASCII [0-9].
157      var len = s.length();
158      var i = 0;
159      if (i < len && (s.charAt(i) == '+' || s.charAt(i) == '-'))
160         i++;
161      var digitsStart = i;
162      while (i < len && isAsciiDigit(s.charAt(i)))
163         i++;
164      var valid = i > digitsStart;
165      if (valid && i < len && s.charAt(i) == '.') {
166         i++;
167         var fracStart = i;
168         while (i < len && isAsciiDigit(s.charAt(i)))
169            i++;
170         valid = i > fracStart;
171      }
172      BigDecimal nanos = null;
173      if (valid) {
174         var value = new BigDecimal(s.substring(0, i));
175         nanos = switch (s.substring(i).toLowerCase()) {
176            case "d" -> value.multiply(BigDecimal.valueOf(86_400_000_000_000L));
177            case "h" -> value.multiply(BigDecimal.valueOf(3_600_000_000_000L));
178            case "m" -> value.multiply(BigDecimal.valueOf(60_000_000_000L));
179            case "s" -> value.multiply(BigDecimal.valueOf(1_000_000_000L));
180            case "ms" -> value.multiply(BigDecimal.valueOf(1_000_000L));
181            case "us" -> value.multiply(BigDecimal.valueOf(1_000L));
182            case "ns" -> value;
183            default -> null;
184         };
185      }
186      if (nanos == null)
187         throw new IllegalArgumentException("Invalid HOCON duration: " + s);
188      return Duration.ofNanos(nanos.longValue());
189   }
190
191   private static boolean isAsciiDigit(char c) {
192      return c >= '0' && c <= '9';
193   }
194
195   // Removes trailing '0' characters. Equivalent of replaceAll("0++$", ""); returns "" if the input is all zeros.
196   private static String trimTrailingZeros(String s) {
197      var end = s.length();
198      while (end > 0 && s.charAt(end - 1) == '0')
199         end--;
200      return s.substring(0, end);
201   }
202}
